title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Mejiro
Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My! Just look at all these wonderful plushies! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So much detail has been put into their outfits!
They're so adorable!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm not especially skilled when it comes to
claw machines...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When I was younger, Dober and I operated one
at a Japanese-style inn we were visiting on a
Mejiro family excursion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But the prizes seemed to escape capture
whenever I was at the controls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I doubt they were literally "escaping" her, I
can definitely picture the scene. With that in
mind...
choice_data_list: Do you want me to try?
Do you want me to try?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You'd be willing to do that? Then yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
